0._value: Having reached level 30 and mastered the way of the Archer, I feel the urge to learn even more.

1._value: Perhaps #b#p221##k of #b#m10001000##k could teach me greater lessons.

2._value: #b#p221##k said that if I can pass the test she gives, she’ll gladly teach me more. I’m no longer the weakling I once was, but hearing that I still have to face a trial makes me a bit nervous.

0._value: Finally, I’ve reached level 30! It hasn’t been easy, but now I’m confident I can stand as a true Archer who won’t lose to anyone. Still… is this really enough? The world is vast, and I find myself wanting to learn more.

1._value: I should probably visit #b#p221##k in #b#m10001000##k again. She might be able to teach me things I’ve never known.

0._value: Hmmm...you have grown a lot since I last saw you. I don't see the weakling I saw before, and instead, look much more like a bowman now.

1._value: No need for a long explanation—you’re here for greater teachings, aren’t you? Seeing someone like you rekindles my own spirit.
